picks.title: US and Iran exchange intensifying fire across Mideast, threatening ceasefire deal
picks.summary: Intensifying military exchanges between the United States and Iran across the Middle East are threatening to unravel the ceasefire brokered last year, with the fighting spilling over into shipping and oil routes in the region.
flags: Fast-moving, active conflict — operational and casualty details remain fluid and contested

picks.title: Andy Burnham poised to become Britain's next PM after most Labour lawmakers support him
picks.summary: Andy Burnham is on the verge of becoming Britain's next prime minister after an overwhelming show of support from Labour lawmakers left him all but certain to replace Keir Starmer.

picks.bucket: US as the world sees it
picks.title: 8 men indicted in planned drone and sniper attack on White House UFC cage-fighting show
picks.summary: US prosecutors indicted eight men over an alleged plot to attack a planned UFC cage-fighting event at the White House using drones and a sniper.
flags: Charges are allegations that have not been tested in court

picks.title: अभिषेक बनर्जी को हाई कोर्ट की फटकार, अन्य खबरें: News Capsule
picks.origTitle: अभिषेक बनर्जी को हाई कोर्ट की फटकार, अन्य खबरें: News Capsule
picks.summary: A news-bulletin segment from India's state broadcaster whose lead item reports that a High Court reprimanded Trinamool Congress leader Abhishek Banerjee, alongside other headlines of the day.
flags: Indian state broadcaster — framing reflects the government's perspective

picks.title: भारत अपना अहम हथियार ब्रह्मोस कई देशों को क्यों बेच रहा है, रूस की परमिशन क्या ज़रूरी है?
picks.origTitle: भारत अपना अहम हथियार ब्रह्मोस कई देशों को क्यों बेच रहा है, रूस की परमिशन क्या ज़रूरी है?
picks.summary: BBC Hindi examines why India is striking deals to export its prized BrahMos supersonic cruise missile to several countries, and whether Russia — its co-developer — must sign off on such sales.

picks.title: 商务部：中方对合规稀土出口许可申请将予以批准
picks.origTitle: 商务部：中方对合规稀土出口许可申请将予以批准
picks.summary: China's Ministry of Commerce said it will approve compliant applications for rare-earth export licenses, framing export controls on these dual-use materials as standard international practice while pledging to facilitate lawful, compliant trade.
flags: Chinese state media — framing reflects the government's position
People's Daily world feed appears infrequently updated; this item is dated June 2025

picks.title: В США дали название новому витку военной операции против Ирана, пишут СМИ
picks.origTitle: В США дали название новому витку военной операции против Ирана, пишут СМИ
picks.summary: Russian state agency RIA Novosti reports, citing media, that the United States has assigned a name to a new phase of its military operation against Iran.
flags: Russian state-media source — treat framing with caution

picks.title: «Би-би-си»: на войне России с Украиной погибли более 3500 иностранцев, завербованных в российские войска
picks.origTitle: «Би-би-си»: на войне России с Украиной погибли более 3500 иностранцев, завербованных в российские войска
picks.summary: Independent outlet Meduza, citing a BBC and Mediazona investigation that maintains a named casualty list, reports that more than 3,500 foreigners recruited into Russian forces have been killed in Russia's full-scale war against Ukraine.
flags: Figure comes from an ongoing journalistic casualty tally, not official data

picks.title: 【詳報】皇室典範改正案 衆院本会議で可決 今国会で成立の公算
picks.origTitle: 【詳報】皇室典範改正案 衆院本会議で可決 今国会で成立の公算
picks.summary: Japan's Lower House passed a bill to amend the Imperial House Law aimed at securing the number of imperial family members, backed by the LDP, Ishin and other parties. It now moves to the Upper House and is likely to be enacted during the current Diet session.

picks.title: 「検察なめんな」の元特捜検事、無罪を主張　「罪は成立しません」
picks.origTitle: 「検察なめんな」の元特捜検事、無罪を主張　「罪は成立しません」
picks.summary: A former Osaka District special-investigation prosecutor — charged with assault and cruelty by a special public official for banging the desk and berating a suspect during questioning ("don't mess with the prosecution") — pleaded not guilty at the opening of his trial, arguing his conduct did not amount to cruelty.

picks.title: Content creator 'Planet Hank' sues Vermont attorney general over AI video probe
picks.summary: A Brattleboro content creator known as 'Planet Hank' is suing Vermont Attorney General Charity Clark, whose office said he may have violated a new state AI political-ad law by posting a video depicting U.S. Rep. Becca Balint being thrown into a dumpster by a political opponent.

picks.title: Drought and water-service outages threaten Puerto Rico's agricultural sector
picks.summary: Drought and interruptions to water service are threatening Puerto Rico's farm sector. The Agriculture Department has not yet reported losses, but experts warn that if conditions persist, production and the agri-food supply chain will suffer.
picks.origTitle: La sequía y las interrupciones en el servicio de agua amenazan al sector agrícola

picks.title: OpenAI announces GPT-5.6
picks.summary: OpenAI announced GPT-5.6, the newest iteration of its flagship model; the release drew heavy discussion on Hacker News.

picks.title: Humanoid robots controlled by surgeons did world-first operation on live pigs
picks.summary: Surgeons remotely controlling humanoid robots performed what researchers describe as a world-first operation on live pigs, a preclinical trial testing whether humanoid robots are feasible in surgery.

picks.title: For the First Time, a Cell Built From Scratch Grows and Divides
picks.summary: Scientists built a synthetic cell from scratch that both grows and divides, combining more lifelike properties than any previous artificial cell — a proof of concept that nonliving materials can be brought close to life in the lab.

picks.title: OpenAI may have made a fatal misstep in copyright fight with news orgs
picks.summary: The New York Times alleges OpenAI feigned an inability to search its training data and hid or deleted billions of ChatGPT logs — conduct the paper says could expose OpenAI to sanctions in the ongoing copyright suit.
flags: Claims are the New York Times' litigation allegations; OpenAI disputes them

picks.title: Live-Action Happy Kanako's Killer Life Series Gets 2nd Season
picks.summary: The live-action adaptation of "Happy Kanako's Killer Life" is getting a second season, set to debut in September.

picks.title: Crunchyroll Streams Same-Day English Dub for 'Goodbye, Lara' Anime
picks.summary: Crunchyroll will stream a same-day English dub for the 'Goodbye, Lara' anime, with a voice cast that includes Brianna Knickerbocker and Anairis Quiñones.

picks.title: Armiger Entertainment Launches Kickstarter Campaign for Tenchi Galaxy Anime Pilot
picks.summary: Armiger Entertainment launched a Kickstarter to fund a 'Tenchi Galaxy' anime pilot, with Tenchi Universe director Hiroshi Negishi returning for a spiritual sequel he hopes to expand into a full new series.

picks.title: #663 2C or Not 2C
picks.summary: The latest episode of the comedy podcast with Mark Normand and Joe List, riffing on Joe's run-in with a 'human speed bump' on a trip and Mark's new scheme for flying next to a large middle-seat passenger.

picks.title: RIDICULOUS - 2026 Special - Trailer #1
picks.summary: Louis C.K. released the first trailer for his 2026 stand-up special, 'Ridiculous.'

picks.title: #484 — Artificial Intimacy
picks.summary: Sam Harris speaks with Paul Bloom about our relationships with AI and the future of human connection — the pace of AI progress, AI companions as a remedy for loneliness, digitally resurrecting the dead, and whether AI can be conscious.

picks.title: About Graham Platner Dropping Out and the "Missing Middle"
picks.summary: The hosts discuss Graham Platner's exit from the Maine Senate race following a sexual assault allegation and what comes next for Maine Democrats, then turn to the shrinking 45-64 'missing middle' and its potential fallout for society and the economy.

picks.title: Episode 335: The Wright Stuff
picks.summary: David and Tamler host Robert Wright to discuss his new book on artificial intelligence and existential risk, debating the magnitude of AI's potential impact and a natural-selection analogy Wright presses in the book.
